data.title: Pendulum Therapeutics Expands Clinical Collaboration to Advance Microbiome Research in Women's Health and Dermatology
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Pendulum Therapeutics, a leading biotechnology company focused on microbiome science for enhancing human health, revealed an extended clinical research partnership with Mayo Clinic. This collaboration aims to investigate novel uses of microbiome-based interventions in healthcare.

data.title: First-Time Homebuyers in Texas Remain Near an All-Time Low
data.description: The Texas Realtors report reveals that the majority of buyers in Texas are older individuals who have previously owned homes, with a growing trend of paying in cash. In 2025, first-time buyers made up only 21% of all homebuyers in Texas, which is close to the historical low of 20%. This indicates a shift towards experienced buyers in the market.

data.title: Trump-Affiliated World Liberty Financial Denies Liquidation Risk After Borrowing $75M Against Own Tokens
data.description: World Liberty Financial (CRYPTO: WLFI) has refuted claims of being at risk of liquidation despite pledging around 5 billion WLFI tokens and borrowing close to $75 million in stablecoins through a decentralized finance platform. Rebutting criticisms regarding its substantial lending activities on Dolomite, WLFI dismissed concerns as unfounded and positioned itself as the protocol's primary borrower. Addressing the situation, WLFI stated, "We are a key participant in WLFI Markets, providing WLFI as collateral and borrowing stablecoins. We are not in danger of liquidation. In the event of adverse market movements, we can increase our collateral." Acting as the anchor borrower, WLFI argued that it plays a critical role in generating yields that attract users to WLFI Markets, with everyday participants currently benefitting from significant stablecoin returns. Further details can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DUOL SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Duolingo
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Duolingo to reach out to him for a consultation regarding their potential legal remedies. If you have incurred significant losses in Duolingo stock or options and wish to explore your options, contact Wilson directly.

data.title: Pando Public Relations Named Best EdTech PR Agency In the 2026 EdTech Awards
data.description: Pando Public Relations, headquartered in Santa Clara, California, has been recognized as the leading EdTech Public Relations agency in the latest 2026 EdTech Awards presented by EdTech Digest. The prestigious accolade underscores Pando's exceptional performance and expertise in the education technology sector. This recognition solidifies Pando's position as a top player in the industry, showcasing their commitment to delivering effective PR services.

data.title: Michael J. Fox Foundation CEO Deborah W. Brooks and Patient Council Member Israel Robledo Appointed to Federal Advisory Council to Guide First-Ever U.S. Parkinson's Strategy
data.description: A Council composed of both public and private entities has been established to oversee the National Parkinson's Project, a comprehensive federal program aimed at expediting research, treatments, and potential cures for Parkinson's and associated illnesses. The key focus of this initiative is to harness joint efforts from various sectors to advance the understanding and management of Parkinson's disease. Notably, the Michael J. Fox Foundation has been instrumental in driving a widespread community campaign that secured significant support for this project.

data.title: CurePSP's Jessica Shurer Joins Inaugural National Parkinson's Project Advisory Council
data.description: Jessica Shurer, the Director of Clinical Affairs and Advocacy at CurePSP, has recently been named to the Advisory Council on Parkinson's Research, Care, and Services of the National Parkinson's Project (NPP). This appointment is significant as it signals a crucial advancement in promoting the development of strategies and support systems for individuals affected by Parkinson's. Shurer's expertise will contribute to the council's efforts to improve research and care initiatives in the realm of Parkinson's disease.

data.title: Iconic Candy Expands Retro Sours at Target With Four Fan-Requested Flavors -- Available for a Limited Time Only
data.description: Experience a burst of nostalgic flavors with Watermelon, Passion Fruit, Raspberry, and Mango in Iconic Candy's newest lineup. In a span of five weeks, starting from April 10, 2026, HOLMDEL, N.J. witnessed the introduction of an extended range of Retro Sours by the rapidly progressing company. Iconic Candy continues to captivate consumers with its reimagined classic treats, appealing to fans of all ages.

data.title: IASO Bio Establishes International Partnership with Instituto Butantan to Develop Innovative Therapy for Hematological Cancer
data.description: A recent agreement has been made to increase availability of a groundbreaking therapy in Brazil. The therapy, specifically designed for patients who have not seen improvement with traditional treatments, is being developed by IASO Biotechnology. The company, based in Shanghai and Nanjing, China, as well as Pleasanton, California, revealed this news on April 10, 2026. This development signifies a significant step towards providing access to innovative medical solutions for patients in need.

data.title: Kastle Announces Direct Integration with the ICE MSP Mortgage Servicing System to Expand AI Adoption in Mortgage Servicing
data.description: A recent announcement stated that Kastle AI has partnered with Intercontinental Exchange’s (ICE) mortgage servicing system, MSP®. This integration enables mortgage servicers utilizing MSP to implement Kastle’s AI agents for streamlined access to servicing data. Kastle AI is recognized as one of the most widely utilized AI agent platforms in the mortgage servicing sector and collaborates with key mortgage servicers in the U.S. Their AI agents specialize in automating extensive servicing tasks in areas like borrower engagement and collections. This move enhances efficiency for mortgage servicers and boosts their capacity to handle high-volume workflows smoothly.
